---
title: "Comprehensive DFT study of the optoelectronic and thermomechanical properties of orthorhombic RbBaPO4 for device applications"
date: 2026-04-01
author:
  - name: Silva, Carlos H.P.
  - name: Santos, Marcelo F.S.
  - name: De J. Pirôpo, Gilvan
  - name: Cavalcanti, Ivana M.G.A.
  - name: Lucena, Joéslei L.O.
  - name: Novais, Érico R.P.
  - name: Novais, Andrea L.F.
  - name: Lalic, Milan V.
  - name: Souza, Divanizia N.
  - name: Dos S. Rezende, Marcos V.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Physica B: Condensed Matter"
  volume: 728
  doi: "10.1016/j.physb.2026.418404"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Comprehensive DFT study of the optoelectronic and thermomechanical properties of orthorhombic RbBaPO4 for device applications</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
